prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
French: Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre était il y a vingt ans. Le deuxième meilleur moment, c'est maintenant. - This proverb emphasizes that while the ideal moment to start something may have passed, the next best time to act is always the present.

Chinese: 最好的时间是二十年前栽种一棵树，第二好的时间就是现在。 - 这句谚语强调，虽然最佳时机可能已经过去，但立即采取行动始终是第二好的选择。
